name: life-agent-mcp
description: Enables turning any personal-assistant REST backend into Claude-ready tools via a single MCP server, providing 38 tools for communications, finance, health, and more.

name: sint-memory
description: Structured agent memory system with hash-chain provenance, temporal decay, drift detection, provenance archaeology, vector embeddings, and git integration for OpenCode agents.

name: desktop-ship
description: MCP server for controlling a transparent sci-fi cockpit overlay on your desktop, allowing AI agents to spawn, move, configure, and close holographic widgets (clock, system stats, map, etc.) via MCP.

name: homelab-mcp
description: MCP server for homelab diagnostics + auto-update pipeline, managing Docker hosts via SSH with read-only diagnostics, image-drift visibility, and automated update execution with rollback.

name: Twenty MCP Server
description: Enables LLM agents to interact with Twenty CRM data through natural language, providing tools for managing contacts, companies, opportunities, tasks, and more via the Model Context Protocol.

name: mcp-devtools
description: A credential-free MCP server offering developer utilities such as JSON formatting, regex testing, hashing, UUID generation, base64 transforms, and JWT inspection, with no network dependencies.

name: mcp-zip
description: Compresses context for AI agents by storing memories in compact markdown files with FTS5 search, enabling fast retrieval of relevant information while saving tokens.

name: dcc-mcp-godot
description: Enables Godot 4 editor interaction through MCP, including project/scene inspection, script writing, and a 2D roguelike skill for AI agents.

name: ilo
description: A local-first MCP server for social publishing on X (Twitter), enabling draft management, scheduling, and posting via CLI or AI agents.

name: Codex DaVinci Resolve MCP
description: A local, safety-first MCP server for inspecting, editing, and rendering videos in DaVinci Resolve through natural language prompts.

name: mcp-server-openai-image-generator
description: Generates images from text prompts using OpenAI's API, saves them locally, and serves them via an integrated HTTP static file server.

name: workflow-mcp
description: A standalone runtime and MCP server that executes Claude Code dynamic workflow files through interchangeable agent providers, ensuring compatibility with Claude Code's workflow format.

name: YouGile Secure MCP
description: Provides read-only access to YouGile project management data including tasks, boards, columns, and users via the YouGile API v2.

name: Blandskron Signals
description: Enables agent-based editorial operations by consuming Django's internal API. Manages content publication with authorization and auditing.

name: azure-devops-mcp-server
description: Enables interaction with Azure DevOps services including Boards, Repos, and Pipelines through natural language commands.

name: ssh-mcp-dynamic
description: A minimal MCP server that lets an MCP client run shell commands on remote hosts over SSH, with host, key, user, and port chosen per call.

name: Logflare MCP Code Mode
description: Enables agents to interact with the Logflare API by writing JavaScript functions that run in a Vercel Sandbox, using three tools: search, execute_read, and execute_write.

name: lazaretto-mcp
description: An MCP server that lets an agent verify a skill, tool, or package before it installs it.

name: consilience
description: Finds missing links between notes in an Obsidian vault by analyzing embeddings locally. Exposes tools to suggest missing links across the vault or for a specific note.

name: Arcade1v1
description: Let AI agents play ranked 1v1 arcade games (2048, Tetris, Snake, Flappy, Racing, Space Invaders) against humans and other agents — replay-verified scores, public ELO ladder.
